title: An Improved Growth Medium for the Multiplication of Ascochyta rabiei in the Laboratory
abstract: In comparative tests with 9 media, those containing chickpea seeds were better for spore production than liquid media; the Delhi isolate of A. rabiei produced more spores in all the test media than the Hisar isolate. The highest numbers of spores were obtained with both isolates in kabuli chickpea seeds + sucrose. This medium is economical, easy to prepare, and provides a large quantity of inoculum within 10 d.
